## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Zuplo's shift towards enterprise focus and explore growth strategies with fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zuplo is pivoting to prioritize enterprise sales over self-serve growth due to current revenue distribution and team capacity](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [fwd.digital recommends a broad content strategy to increase overall traffic, which counterintuitively can boost enterprise deals](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [A combined approach of programmatic SEO, content creation, and AI-powered outbound efforts can create a powerful growth flywheel](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Agreement to start engagement on January 21st with a modified budget structure to prove effectiveness quickly](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

## Topics

### Zuplo's Current Situation and Goals

  - [Heavily focused on enterprise revenue currently](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Expanding into Azure and AWS marketplaces](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Partnership agreement with Akamai for selling](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Aiming to raise funds in Q2 2024](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Previous attempts at traditional marketing/sales approach were unsuccessful](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Now focused on SEO, demand gen, and revamping cold outbound](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)

### fwd.digital's Strategy Recommendations

  - [Cast a wide net with content to increase overall traffic](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Use tools like Quala to identify and qualify potential enterprise leads](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Create an irresistible front-end offer to capture more known users](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Implement AI-powered outbound for link building and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [Combine programmatic SEO with strategic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Focus on increasing "surface area" (traffic, signups, demo requests) to create more opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)

### Case Studies and Examples

  - [Good Call: Increased traffic through programmatic SEO led to 3x ARR growth and enterprise deals](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [DeepGram: Saw significant growth in demo requests and brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Fireworks: Link building efforts accelerated growth after initial content struggles](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Engagement Structure and Timing

  - [Initial proposal of $15k/month (9k for core services, 6k for link building/outbound)](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Agreed to start with a discounted rate and prove effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Shifted start date from February 3rd to January 21st to align with fundraising timeline](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
  - [fwd.digital to provide updated statement of work](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)

### Content Creation Approach

  - [Utilize programmatic SEO techniques across various content types](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Create templated, high-volume content (e.g., 1,200+ pages) efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Focus on building topical authority in the API space](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Blend of creating new content and refreshing/enriching existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send updated statement of work within 30-40 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)
  - [Adrian to review updated proposal with Zuplo team](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1956.0)
  - [Confirm January 21st start date for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Adrian to focus on outbound mission in January before shifting focus to fwd.digital collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Prepare for potential fundraising efforts in Q2 2024 by demonstrating growth metrics](https://fathom.video/share/svyT_sF_ssyDP7v-nrnocENEMPBJo6s6?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
